violations.text: The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Test strips must be obtained. New Violation. Correct By: 12/24/2025

3 Door Reach-In was observed with an ambient temperature of 50 degrees Fahrenheit. Eggs stored in unit were observed held at 50 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Reviewed invoice stating that eggs were received that morning. Egg cartons were moved to different unit at the time of inspection. TCS foods are to not be stored in unit until ambient temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or lower is maintained. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/18/2024

The doors to the outside, located on either side of store front, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Establishment is to install weather stripping or door sweeps to prevent the entry of pests. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024

The establishment is lacking a 3-bay sink to wash, rinse, and sanitize dishes from coffee production. Establishment is to install 3-bay sink or use single-serve coffee machine. New Violation. Correct By: 10/18/2024
